name: Mechanical Keyboard
description: Compact mechanical keyboard with tactile switches, aluminum frame and customizable RGB lighting.

name: Wireless Mouse
description: Ergonomic wireless mouse with adjustable DPI, silent clicks and long battery life.

name: Ultrabook 14
description: Lightweight 14-inch laptop with fast SSD storage, high-resolution display and all-day battery.

name: 27-inch Monitor
description: 27-inch IPS monitor with sharp image quality, slim bezels and USB-C connectivity.

name: Studio Headset
description: Closed-back headset with clear microphone, soft ear cushions and balanced sound.

name: Bluetooth Speaker
description: Portable Bluetooth speaker with compact body, deep bass and water-resistant design.

name: Portable SSD 1TB
description: Fast external SSD with USB-C connection, compact aluminum body and 1TB capacity.

name: USB-C Dock
description: Multi-port USB-C dock with HDMI, Ethernet, card reader and power delivery support.

name: Tablet Pro 11
description: 11-inch tablet with bright display, slim metal body and support for keyboard accessories.

name: Webcam 1080p
description: Full HD webcam with autofocus, privacy cover and dual microphones for video calls.

name: Wi-Fi 6 Router
description: Dual-band Wi-Fi 6 router designed for stable streaming, gaming and home office setups.

name: USB Microphone
description: USB condenser microphone with desk stand, mute control and clean voice capture.
